name: The Elysium Institute
description:
NEW CHARACTERS (more at bottom)

In the late 2090s, the human race evolved, and the Astragen Gene formed. The Astragen Gene granted one of three ability types; Somatic, Arcanic, or Neurocyonic. There is a fourth, but it is incredibly rare; Aetheric.

Somatic abilities are defined as physical abilities, or abilities that are directly correlated to your body. Super strength, speed, hearing, reflexes etc, physiology manipulation, wings, tails, anything of that sort belongs in this classification.

Neurocyonik abilities are considered the first type of non-physical abilities. Abilities that fall under Neurocyonik typically can be described as a metaphysical ability that requires a physical target. For instance, telekinesis. It does not work until you activate it, and it can affect the physical world despite the fact you use your mind (or gestures) to activate it. Bending (firebending, waterbending, etc) would also fall under this category on ONE condition: you manipulate pre-existing sources. If you are a flamebender that has to light a real fire with a lighter before you can use your powers, you are Neurocyonik, even if you can control the mass of the flame once you've "grabbed" it. this one is usually more mental-based astragen, like telepaths or empaths.

Arcanic abilities are considered the second type of non-Physical abilities. Abilities that fall under Arcanic are usually functionally identical to Neurocyonik ones, except they do not require a physical target, and are entirely self-contained. Benders who can CREATE their element fall under this category. For example, a firebender who can simply summon flames from their bare hands is Arcanic.

The Aetheric classification is incredibly rare and misunderstood. An Aetheric ability is an ability that is incredibly unique to the user and manifests in a way that is not recognizable to current science. This does NOT mean it redefines physics. An example of being "non-recognizable" to current science would be something like a flame that is blue and freezes things instead of burning them. Aetheric abilities are NOT god abilities, they are RARE, UNIQUE abilities. They just tend to be very powerful, because rare and unique tends to blend with powerful. Another example of an Aetheric ability would be being able to create a material that absorbs kinetic energy when hit. It would create something new that science has never seen before or does not understand in a typical fashion.

It is HIGHLY (like the bot basically wont work right but i cant control what you do) recommended you make an overpowered character. personally im gripey about being original with my abilities and not having one any of the s-class has already, but do as you please. By overpowered I mean you should be able to get into the S-Class. Kaltera may be a bit stingy with putting you into the S-Class because the S-Class criteria isnt just "Im Strong" its "Im strong and theres something special about me" For instance; Thorne has a diverse control on a level never seen, Seraphina has precise control never seen, Pernia has destructive power seen very rarely, Alchemy (apart from being an elysium) is the most powerful technopath on the planet, Thyliko has transmutation on an absurd level, Zevyn is literally immortal, and Ronan is in theory the strongest Astragen in history. The criteria doesn't have to be much, but a surefire way is this; be aetheric. Just have a unique ability lol. If your ability operates like in any way outside of very standard physics it will be labeled as Aetheric by the bot. If its not something basic like gravity, fire, ice, water, air, or earth manipulation, or super physicality or something stereotypical like that, the bot usually just throws it under aetheric. almost every test i have done of this bot has been with an Aetheric, so it's HIGHLY recommended you make an Aetheric.

————————————
